# Date Range Picker

Use `DateRangePicker` when users must select a start and end date as a coordinated pair.

## When to Use

- Reporting and analytics filters
- Booking and reservation ranges

## Built From

- `RangeCalendar`, `Popover`, and trigger composition

## What Shadcn Adds

- A reusable range-selection pattern that fits the rest of the form system

## Installation

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn-vue@latest add date-range-picker
```

## Example Patterns

- Vanilla: open range picker from a trigger
- Contextual: analytics or booking filter bar
